_schema: Per-SKILL × per-question safe-default registry. Key = SKILL slug. Inner key = question text (verbatim from SKILL.md AskUserQuestion JSON). Value = {safe_default: option label/value, rationale: why}. Used by tests/ux-ask-fallback-registry.test.ts to mechanically lock D1 fallback contract — adding a new AskUserQuestion question without registering its safe-default fails the test. Phase 17 US-1705 / Critic round 2 hardening.
_path_history: Originally proposed skills/_shared/ask-defaults.json (Architect r2 → tests/manifest.test.ts:548 collision) → tests/fixtures/ask-defaults.json (Critic r2 → tests/fixtures.test.ts:38 toBe(40) collision) → final tests/fixtures/ask-defaults/registry.json (subdir bypasses both invariants — non-recursive readdirSync ignores subdir entries).

deploy._note: deploy SKILL Step 3 uses a free-form text preview card (5-field identity layout), NOT a structured AskUserQuestion JSON block. Plan §2.1.A.137 proposed JSON migration but deferred to Phase 18 to keep ship surface tight. Default behavior in non-interactive subprocess: --dry-run (most conservative).

다시 로그인할래요?.rationale: Subprocess cannot complete OAuth Device Flow. Abort + tell user to re-run interactively.

로그아웃할래요?.rationale: Logout deletes the local axhub token; subprocess/non-interactive mode must not kill a session automatically.

직전 안정 커밋으로 다시 배포해요?.rationale: Forward-fix is destructive deploy_create. Subprocess must not auto-rollback without explicit human confirm.

다른 팀 API도 볼래요? 권한 있는 모든 endpoint 보여줄 수 있.rationale: Privacy-first: never widen scope to cross-team without explicit human consent (PLAN row 46 audit log requirement).

앱이 더 있어요. 전체 목록 볼래요?.rationale: Top 10 sufficient for vibe-coder browse; full list rarely needed in non-interactive.

어떤 작업 원해요?.rationale: Ambiguous intent in non-interactive context — agent cannot guess; surface ambiguity message and stop.

여러 항목 점검 필요해요. 어디부터 고쳐요?.rationale: Diagnosis output sufficient in non-interactive; subprocess should not auto-trigger remediation.

axhub CLI 업그레이드해요?.rationale: Binary replacement is destructive; non-interactive subprocess must not auto-upgrade.

플러그인 업그레이드 명령 보여줄까요?.rationale: Read-only display action, safe in subprocess. Show the upgrade command without executing it.

logs._note: logs SKILL uses inline AskUserQuestion narration ('빌드 로그 / 런타임 로그 / 둘 다') without a structured JSON block. Default = build (most common failure-mode use case). Test parses 'AskUserQuestion (...)' inline literal and falls back to logs.* defaults below.

status._note: status SKILL delegates AskUserQuestion sites to recovery-flows.md (cold-cache deploy pick) and error-empathy-catalog.md (exit-65 re-login). Defaults handled at delegation point.

어떤 템플릿으로 시작할까요?.rationale: Template choice creates files. Non-interactive subprocess must not scaffold without an explicit human selection.

어떤 환경변수 작업을 할까요?.rationale: Env set/delete can mutate secrets. Non-interactive mode may list masked keys only.

GitHub 연동 작업을 고를까요?.rationale: GitHub connect/disconnect changes deployment source bindings. Non-interactive mode should only list available repos.

open._note: open SKILL is read-only and has no structured AskUserQuestion site. It only calls axhub open/URL display paths.

whatsnew._note: whatsnew SKILL is read-only and has no structured AskUserQuestion site. It summarizes axhub whatsnew output.

프로필 작업을 고를까요?.rationale: Profile add/use changes endpoint context. Non-interactive mode may only show the current profile.
